case_title: SYNCHRONY BANK VS. CAROL YEE ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-31-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-31-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 62259858) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100089857) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, CAROL AKA CAROL T YEE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 62251297), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK SERVED MAR-09-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, CAROL AKA CAROL T YEE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, CAROL AKA CAROL T YEE DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-06-2018

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YEE, CAROL AKA CAROL T YEE $1,641.39 PRINCIPAL, $324.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,965.79, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62259858)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 62259858) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 62259858) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYNCHRONY BANK

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $324.40 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 62259858) AS TO DEFENDANT YEE, CAROL AKA CAROL T YEE
